title: EARLY PREDICTION METHOD AND ELECTRONIC EQUIPMENT OF LUNG CANCER BASED ON DEEP LEARNING; 基于深度学习的肺癌早期预测方法、电子设备
abstract:
本发明公开了基于深度学习的肺癌早期预测方法，包括如下步骤：获取肺部CT影像数据，所述肺部CT影像数据由若干肺部切片组成；对所述肺部CT影像数据进行预处理操作；设计肺结节检测模型；设计肺结节分类模型；根据每批次的样本数训练肺结节检测模型。本发明对原始CT数据通过预处理器等转换成模型可训练数据，并将训练后的模型部署在服务器，利用该服务器的模型对上传CT数据后的患者肺部结节进行检测，输出结节位置和大小，预测结节的良恶性，并对下一次检查的结节状态进行预测。

The present invention discloses a method for early prediction of lung cancer based on deep learning, including the following steps: acquiring lung CT image data, the lung CT image data being composed of several lung slices; performing preprocessing operations on the lung CT image data ; Design a lung nodule detection model; design a lung nodule classification model; train a lung nodule detection model according to the number of samples in each batch. The present invention converts the original CT data into model trainable data through a preprocessor, etc., and deploys the trained model on a server, uses the server model to detect the patient's lung nodules after uploading the CT data, and outputs the nodules Position and size, predict the benign and malignant nodule, and predict the state of the nodule in the next examination.

title: CONSTRUCTION METHOD AND APPLICATION OF LOCALIZATION MODEL OF LESION AREA IN CHEST IMAGE; 一种胸部图像中病灶区域的定位模型的构建方法及应用
abstract:
本发明提供了一种胸部图像中病灶区域的定位模型的构建方法及应用，包括：A、获取指定数量的胸部疾病患者的胸部X光图像；B、对所述X光图像进行图像预处理，以获取预处理后的图像数据；C、将所述预处理后的图像数据输入至卷积神经网络模型进行训练，以获取训练后的用于胸部图像中病灶区域的定位的模型。由上，本申请通过上述模型能够准确地预测图像中病灶位置的区域位置，以供用户参考，以大大减少医生的诊断时间，降低漏诊和误诊率。

The present invention provides a method and application for constructing a positioning model of a lesion area in a chest image, including: A. Acquiring a specified number of chest X-ray images of patients with chest diseases; B. Performing image preprocessing on the X-ray images, To obtain pre-processed image data; C. Input the pre-processed image data to a convolutional neural network model for training, so as to obtain a trained model for locating the lesion area in the chest image. From the above, the present application can accurately predict the location of the lesion in the image through the above model for the user's reference, so as to greatly reduce the doctor's diagnosis time and reduce the missed diagnosis and misdiagnosis rate.

title: CONSTRUCTION METHOD AND APPLICATION OF A CHEST DISEASE DETECTION MODEL; 一种胸部疾病检测模型的构建方法及应用
abstract:
本发明提供了一种胸部疾病检测模型的构建方法及应用，包括：A、获取指定数量的胸部疾病患者的胸部X光图像；B、对所述X光图像进行图像预处理，以获取预处理后的图像数据；C、将所述预处理后的图像数据输入至卷积神经网络模型进行训练，以获取训练后的用于胸部疾病检测的模型。由上，本申请通过上述模型能够准确地预测胸部疾病类型及区域位置，大大减少医生的诊断时间，降低漏诊和误诊率。

The present invention provides a method and application for constructing a chest disease detection model, including: A. Obtaining chest X-ray images of a specified number of patients with chest diseases; B. Performing image preprocessing on the X-ray images to obtain preprocessing C. Input the preprocessed image data to the convolutional neural network model for training, so as to obtain a trained model for chest disease detection. From the above, this application can accurately predict the type and location of chest diseases through the above model, greatly reducing the diagnosis time for doctors, and reducing the missed diagnosis and misdiagnosis rate.

title: A SUPER-PIXEL METHOD FOR MEDICAL IMAGE SEGMENTATION; 一种面向医学图像分割的超像素方法
abstract:
本发明提供一种面向医学图像分割的超像素方法，将医学图像处理为超像素；对超像素分割后医学图像使用双边滤波保留边缘,并滤除噪声，降低网络模型的误差率；配置网络框架,通过迭代训练参数,构建卷积网络应用于超像素分割的医学图像。方法中以线性迭代聚类分割方法为基础,将U‑Net网络的思想应用于超像素的后期优化中,弥补超像素内边缘分割不精确的缺陷,增加规范层以提高各网络层权重灵敏度,改善网络收敛性能，使分割结果更接近于实际值。由于医学图像呈现的解剖结构和病变组织十分清晰,通过SLIC算法分割的医学图像能够获取较为全面的超像素，并可通过卷积网络进一步改进超像素边缘精确度。

The present invention provides a superpixel method for medical image segmentation, which processes the medical image into superpixels; uses bilateral filtering to preserve the edges of the medical image after superpixel segmentation, filters out noise, and reduces the error rate of the network model; configures the network framework , Through iterative training parameters, construct a convolutional network to be applied to medical images for superpixel segmentation. The method is based on the linear iterative clustering segmentation method. The idea of U-Net network is applied to the post-optimization of superpixels to make up for the defects of inaccurate edge segmentation in superpixels. The standard layer is added to improve the weight sensitivity of each network layer. Improve the network convergence performance and make the segmentation result closer to the actual value. Since the anatomical structure and diseased tissues presented by medical images are very clear, medical images segmented by SLIC algorithm can obtain more comprehensive superpixels, and the edge accuracy of superpixels can be further improved through convolutional networks.

title: METHOD FOR MARKING SPECIAL TISSUES OF LUNG CT IMAGE; 一种肺部CT影像特殊组织的标记方法
abstract:
本发明公开了一种肺部ct影像特殊组织的标记方法，包括如下步骤：(1)、样本标记：(2)、设计语义分割模型：以像素分割的方式，在原始图像中标记出特定对象的区域，并依此建立一个U‑Net模型；(3)、特殊组织检测模型的训练：采用图像变换方法，对原始图像和掩模图像同时进行变换，以进行数据增强；(4)、计算模型性能的度量指标：模型性能的度量指标就是Dice系数，起计算公式为：本发明可以提升肺结节检查准确率。

The present invention discloses a method for marking special tissues of lung CT images, including the following steps: (1), sample labeling: (2), designing a semantic segmentation model: marking a specific object in the original image in the manner of pixel segmentation Establish a U-Net model based on this; (3). Training of special tissue detection model: adopt image transformation method to transform the original image and mask image at the same time for data enhancement; (4), calculation Model performance measurement index: The measurement index of model performance is the Dice coefficient, and the starting calculation formula is:The invention can improve the accuracy of lung nodule inspection.
claims:
1.一种肺部Ct影像特殊组织的标记方法，其特征在于，包括如下步骤： (1)、样本标记:LIDCTDRI肺结节公开数据集和LUNA16肺结节检测竞赛数据集中，用传 统方法，标记出肺部ct影像特殊组织样本； (2)、设计语义分割模型：以像素分割的方式，在原始图像中标记出特定对象的区域，并 依此建立一个U-Net模型； (3)、特殊组织检测模型的训练:采用图像变换方法，对原始图像和掩模图像同时进行 变换，以进行数据增强； 其中训练的batch size为4,优化方法为带动量的SGD,学习率固定为0.001。 (4)、计算模型性能的度量指标:模型性能的度量指标就是Dice系数，起计算公式为： 2\Xf\Y] c — : IXI+IH ：0 2.如权利要求1所述的一种肺部ct影像特殊组织的标记方法，其特征在于：步骤(3)中 采用的图像变换方法为随机弹性变换、随机旋转、随机翻转和随机平移。 3.如权利要求1所述的一种肺部ct影像特殊组织的标记方法，其特征在于：步骤(3)中 对原始图像和掩模图像进行变换时，要使用同样的变换方法和变换参数。

title: AN AUTOMATIC SEGMENTATION METHOD OF HEAD AND NECK TUMORS IN MRI IMAGES; 一种MRI图像中自动头颈肿瘤分割方法
abstract:
本发明公开一种MRI图像中自动头颈肿瘤分割方法，包括步骤：训练基于U‑net的神经网络模型：神经网络模型包括用于分析输入MRI图像的收缩编码器和用于产生标签图输出的扩展解码器；在U‑net架构中使用跳跃连接将浅层编码层的外观特征表示与深度解码层的高级特征表示相结合；利用所述神经网络模型在待测试MRI图像中分割NPC肿瘤区域图像。本发明能够实现快速、稳健且精确的自动在MRI图像中分割NPC肿瘤。

The invention discloses an automatic head and neck tumor segmentation method in MRI images, which includes the steps of training a neural network model based on U-net: the neural network model includes a contraction encoder for analyzing input MRI images and an extension for generating label map output Decoder; uses jump connections in the U-net architecture to combine the appearance feature representation of the shallow coding layer with the high-level feature representation of the deep decoding layer; use the neural network model to segment the NPC tumor region image in the MRI image to be tested. The invention can realize fast, robust and accurate automatic segmentation of NPC tumors in MRI images.
claims:
1 .一种MRI图像中自动头颈肿瘤分割方法，其特征在于，包括步骤： S100,训练基于U-net的神经网络模型：神经网络模型包括用于分析输入MRI图像的收 缩编码器和用于产生标签图输出的扩展解码器;在U-net架构中使用跳跃连接将浅层编码 层的外观特征表示与深度解码层的高级特征表示相结合； 训练所述基于U-net的神经网络模型，包括步骤： S101，对图像训练集进行数据预处理和数据增强;数据增强为通过应用随机非线性变 换； S102,通过图像训练集中整个MRI图像来训练神经网络，并使用跳跃连接来组合分层特 征以生成标签图； S103,通过标签图结合增强后的数据训练基于U-net的神经网络模型； S200，利用所述神经网络模型在待测试MRI图像中分割NPC肿瘤区域图像，包括步骤:对 待测试MRI图像进行数据采集、图像预处理和分割NPC肿瘤区域图像； 所述分割NPC肿瘤包括步骤:在所述神经网络模型的标签映射中的每个像素表示的肿 瘤区域标记为1并且正常区域标记为0；在U-net架构中使用的跳过连接将来自扩展解码层 的高级特征与从收缩编码层的外观特征相结合;通过具有分层特征的组合分割图像中的 NPC肿瘤区域，得到NPC肿瘤区域图像； 所述数据增强包括步骤:通过图像变形处理方式获得不同形状的MRI图像训练标记NPC 数据;所述图像变形是将MRI图像的行和列分割成片段，从而在MRI图像中获得具有相同大 小的盒子;盒子边界上的顶点表示图像变形的范围，盒子边界内的所有顶点作为源控制点， 从而得到控制点的目标位置;将变形函数应用于网络中的每个顶点，获得不同形状的MRI图 像训练标记NPC数据。 2 title: AN AUTOMATIC SEGMENTATION METHOD OF HEAD AND NECK TUMORS IN MRI IMAGES; 一种MRI图像中自动头颈肿瘤分割方法
abstract:
本发明公开一种MRI图像中自动头颈肿瘤分割方法，包括步骤：训练基于U‑net的神经网络模型：神经网络模型包括用于分析输入MRI图像的收缩编码器和用于产生标签图输出的扩展解码器；在U‑net架构中使用跳跃连接将浅层编码层的外观特征表示与深度解码层的高级特征表示相结合；利用所述神经网络模型在待测试MRI图像中分割NPC肿瘤区域图像。本发明能够实现快速、稳健且精确的自动在MRI图像中分割NPC肿瘤。

The invention discloses an automatic head and neck tumor segmentation method in an MRI image, which includes the steps of training a neural network model based on U-net: the neural network model includes a contraction encoder for analyzing input MRI images and an extension for generating label map output Decoder; uses jump connections in the U-net architecture to combine the appearance feature representation of the shallow coding layer with the high-level feature representation of the deep decoding layer; use the neural network model to segment the NPC tumor region image in the MRI image to be tested. The invention can realize fast, robust and accurate automatic segmentation of NPC tumors in MRI images.

title: A SYSTEM AND METHOD BASED ON PET PATTERN IMAGING; 一种基于PET图形成像的系统及方法
abstract:
本发明公开一种基于PET图形成像的系统及方法，局部自适应融合网络模块，将原始图像中的L‑PET图像和多模态MRI图像作为输入，并通过学习不同图像位置处的不同卷积核生成融合图像；发生器网络模块，将融合图像通过训练生成合成F‑PET图像；鉴别器网络模块，以L‑PET图像和真实F‑PET图像组成真实对，以L‑PET图像和合成F‑PET图像组成合成对，将所述真实对和合成对作为输入，瞄准区分真实对和合成对得到最终合成图像。本发明减少由PET扫描固有的示踪剂辐射引起的潜在健康风险，从低剂量合成高质量PET图像以减少辐射暴露，同时保持图像质量。

The invention discloses a system and method based on PET image imaging, a local adaptive fusion network module, which takes L-PET image and multi-modal MRI image in the original image as input, and learns different convolutions at different image positions The core generates the fusion image; the generator network module, which trains the fusion image to generate a synthetic F-PET image; the discriminator network module, uses the L-PET image and the real F-PET image to form a real pair, and uses the L-PET image and the synthetic F PET images are composed of synthetic pairs, the real pair and synthetic pair are used as input, and the final synthetic image is obtained by distinguishing between the real pair and the synthetic pair. The present invention reduces potential health risks caused by tracer radiation inherent in PET scanning, and synthesizes high-quality PET images from low doses to reduce radiation exposure while maintaining image quality.

title: AN ULTRASOUND IMAGE SEGMENTATION METHOD OF THYROID NODULES BASED ON CASCADED FULLY CONVOLUTIONAL NEURAL NETWORK; 一种级联全卷积神经网络的甲状腺结节超声图像分割方法
abstract:
本发明公开了一种级联全卷积神经网络的甲状腺结节超声图像分割方法，包括：构建基于U‑Net的简易全卷积神经网络，根据简易全卷积神经网络对甲状腺超声数据中的超声图像进行分割，从中分割出感兴趣区域；采用VGG19‑FCN网络作为下采样层提取感兴趣区域的深层特征，以此实现对甲状腺结节的自动语义分割；其中，所述简易全卷积神经网络包括：用于下采样的五次卷积层、以及用于上采样的五次上采样层；其中，前五次卷积conv均由两个3x3的卷积层和一个池化层组成，每个卷积层均使用ReLU作为激活函数，后五次上采样层均为反卷积层。本发明为甲状腺结节良恶性的识别提供高精度的结节图像，从而在医学诊断方面起到更好的辅助作用。

The invention discloses a thyroid nodule ultrasound image segmentation method based on a cascaded full convolutional neural network, which includes: constructing a simple full convolutional neural network based on U-Net, and analyzing data in thyroid ultrasound data according to the simple full convolutional neural network. The ultrasound image is segmented to segment the region of interest; the VGG19-FCN network is used as the down-sampling layer to extract the deep features of the region of interest, so as to realize the automatic semantic segmentation of thyroid nodules; wherein the simple fully convolutional neural The network includes: five convolutional layers for downsampling and five upsampling layers for upsampling; among them, the first five convolutional conv are all composed of two 3x3 convolutional layers and one pooling layer, Each convolutional layer uses ReLU as the activation function, and the last five upsampling layers are all deconvolutional layers. The invention provides high-precision nodule images for the identification of benign and malignant thyroid nodules, thereby playing a better auxiliary role in medical diagnosis.
claims:
1 .一种级联全卷积神经网络的甲状腺结节超声图像分割方法，其特征在于,所述方法 包括以下步骤： 构建基于U-Net的简易全卷积神经网络，根据简易全卷积神经网络对甲状腺超声数据 中的超声图像进行语义分割，从中分割出感兴趣区域； 采用VGG19-FCN网络作为下采样层提取感兴趣区域的深层特征，以此实现对甲状腺结 节的自动语义分割； 其中，所述简易全卷积神经网络包括： 用于下采样的五次卷积层、以及用于上采样的五次上采样层； 其中，前五次卷积层均由两个3x3的卷积层和一个池化层组成，每个卷积层均使用ReLU 作为激活函数，后五次上采样层均为反卷积层； 所述简易全卷积神经网络使用五次卷积和池化对输入图像进行下采样提取深层特征， 用于对不同类别的像素进行神经网络的像素分类;再将每次池化下采样的特征图依次与上 采样中的特征图进行插值，再将上采样特征图逐步还原到原图分辨率的过程中补充浅层细 节信息； 所述VGG19-FCN网络的最后三层全连接层为7 X7X 4096、1 X 1 X 4096和1 X 1 X 2的卷积 层，由于甲状腺结节分割是一个像素的二分类问题，最后一层卷积深度为2； 所述VGG19-FCN网络通过3次反卷积从第5层开始逐步向上采样3次，其中前两次分别与 池化层pool4和pool5进行插值从而补充下采样过程中丢掉的细节信息，最后一次上采样还 原到原图分辨率，得到掩码图像，通过掩码图像在ROI中绘制出结节的边缘。 2 .根据权利要求1所述的一种级联全卷积神经网络的甲状腺结节超声图像分割方法， 其特征在于， 所述简易全卷积神经网络的输出作为所述VGG19-FCN网络的输入，在所述简易全卷积 神经网络对训练集测试集做出分割后经过筛选就是所述VGG19-FCN网络的训练集和测试 集。

1 A method for segmentation of ultrasound images of thyroid nodules based on cascaded fully convolutional neural networks, characterized in that the method comprises the following steps: constructing a simple fully convolutional neural network based on U-Net, according to the simple fully convolutional neural network Perform semantic segmentation on ultrasound images in thyroid ultrasound data to segment regions of interest; VGG19-FCN network is used as the down-sampling layer to extract deep features of regions of interest to realize automatic semantic segmentation of thyroid nodules; among them, The simple fully convolutional neural network includes: five convolutional layers for downsampling, and five upsampling layers for upsampling; wherein the first five convolutional layers are all composed of two 3x3 convolutional layers And a pooling layer, each convolutional layer uses ReLU as the activation function, the last five upsampling layers are all deconvolutional layers; the simple fully convolutional neural network uses five convolutions and pooling to input The image is down-sampled to extract deep features, which are used for pixel classification of different categories of pixels; then the feature map of each pooling down-sampling is interpolated with the feature map in the up-sampling, and then the up-sampling feature map The shallow detail information is supplemented during the process of gradually restoring the resolution of the original image; the last three fully connected layers of the VGG19-FCN network are 7 X7X 4096, 1 X 1 X 4096 and 1 X 1 X 2 convolutional layers, Since thyroid nodule segmentation is a two-pixel classification problem, the convolution depth of the last layer is 2; The VGG19-FCN network gradually upsamples 3 times from the 5th layer through 3 times of deconvolution. The first two times are interpolated with the pooling layers pool4 and pool5 to supplement the detailed information lost in the downsampling process. The last time Up-sampling is restored to the original resolution to obtain a mask image, and the edge of the nodule is drawn in the ROI through the mask image. 2 The method for segmentation of ultrasound images of thyroid nodules with a cascaded full convolutional neural network according to claim 1, wherein the output of the simple full convolutional neural network is used as the input of the VGG19-FCN network, After the simple full convolutional neural network divides the training set and the test set, the training set and the test set of the VGG19-FCN network are filtered.

title: AN INTEGRATED EQUIPMENT AND SYSTEM FOR EARLY LUNG CANCER DETECTION AND CLASSIFICATION BASED ON DEEP LEARNING; 一种基于深度学习的早期肺癌检测分类一体化设备及系统
abstract:
本发明公开了一种基于深度学习的早期肺癌检测分类一体化设备及系统Cancer Early Test System；包括早期肺癌检测触控终端、肺癌检测服务器、肺癌检测病例存储设备；CETS基于U‑NET设计了TNet，用于早期肺癌和肺结节检测分类；数据预处理模块将患者肺CT影像数据处理成CETS可读的3D肺图像，利用TNet肺结节3D检测分类网络对肺图像进行语义分割，按恶性程度输出肺结节区域和概率；通过TNet肺癌3D检测分类网络对肺结节的特征进行分析，最终得到肺癌种类、概率和肺结节种类、形态等详细信息检测报告；CETS在TNet中首次引入光流追踪算法，解决了由于CT影像的层状性特点形成的数据缺失、相互矛盾以及网络检测遗漏所丢失的结节信息，辅助医生进行肺癌诊断，减少了漏诊误诊的风险。

The invention discloses an integrated equipment and system for early lung cancer detection and classification based on deep learning, Cancer Early Test System; it includes an early lung cancer detection touch terminal, a lung cancer detection server, and a lung cancer detection case storage device; CETS designs TNet based on U-NET , Used for the detection and classification of early lung cancer and lung nodules; the data preprocessing module processes the patients lung CT image data into CETS-readable 3D lung images, and uses the TNet lung nodule 3D detection and classification network to perform semantic segmentation on the lung images, according to malignant Output the area and probability of lung nodules by degree; analyze the characteristics of lung nodules through the TNet lung cancer 3D detection classification network, and finally get the detailed information detection report of lung cancer type, probability and lung nodule type and shape; CETS was first introduced in TNet The optical flow tracking algorithm solves the data missing, contradictory and missing nodule information due to the layered characteristics of CT images, and assists doctors in the diagnosis of lung cancer, reducing the risk of missed diagnosis and misdiagnosis.

An integrated equipment and system for early lung cancer detection and classification (CETS) based on deep learning, which is characterized by including the following modules: (1) Early lung cancer detection touch terminal: mainly includes a parameter setting module and a post-processing module; doctors pass CETS The touch terminal parameter setting module sets the model parameters, and chooses to use the precise model TNet-VE or the fast model TNet-VQ for detection; CETS automatically loads the patients lung CT images to the early lung cancer detection server, and after the detection is completed, the CETS touch terminal In the post-processing module, doctors can view the classification report of lung cancer and lung nodule detection, and can print it. At the same time, the patients name and CT diagnostic image of the patients lungs can be used as search conditions to retrieve similar patient cases in the CETS confirmed case database, which is convenient Comparative analysis of doctors; (2) Early lung cancer detection server: mainly includes preprocessing module and lung cancer detection depth model. The depth model uses TNet detection classification network. This network is improved on the basis of U-NET, and optical flow tracking algorithm is introduced for the first time. The data is missing due to the layered characteristics of CT images, contradictions and nodule information missing from network detection, and provides two models for accurate detection of TNet-VE and rapid detection of TNet-VQ; the preprocessing module automatically detects the patient The lung CT images are processed into CETS-readable three-dimensional lung images, using TNet-VE or The TNet-VQ lung nodule 3D detection classification network detects the nodule area and classifies the nodules. At the same time, the extracted T0P10 lung nodules and offset nodules are input into the TNet or TNet-VQ lung cancer 3D detection classification network to obtain the lung cancer detection results , Combined with lung nodules and lung cancer detection results to generate a test report; (3) Early lung cancer detection case storage device: connected to the hospital PACS system, mainly including the confirmed case library module and the model self-learning case library module; after the detection is completed, the doctor confirms If the test result is correct, the system will automatically back up the test result to the confirmed case database and synchronize it to the PACS system. Update server detection system. 2. In the fusion layer, position information is introduced. Fully connected includes two hidden layers and 7 output units. The sigmoid function is used for classification; (2) TNet-VQ lung nodule 3D fast detection and classification model: 8 3D Convolutional layer, 2 3D residual blocks, 2 3D deconvolution layers, 2 fusion layers, 2 optical flow tracking layers, 1 RPN layer and 1 fully connected layer, including the first 2 convolution kernels 2*2*2* 24, the 3-6th convolution unit consists of convolution+RELU+2*2 maximum pooling, the third convolution kernel is 3*3*3*32, the 4-6th convolution The kernel is 3*3*3*64, the last two convolution kernels are (64,15), and the residual block consists of 3 residual units 3* (3*3*3 convolution+BN +RELU+3*3 *3 Convolution+BN+RELU) +2*2 maximum pooling composition, 3D deconvolution kernel size is 2*2*2, and in the fusion layer Introduced the position information, the full connection includes two hidden layers and 7 output units, using the sigmoid function for classification; (3) Image denoising unit: Convert the CT pixel value image to the standard Heinz unit image, using two-dimensional median filtering The algorithm removes salt and pepper noise, uses a threshold method to binarize CT images, and uses morphological opening operations to remove backgrounds such as examination beds and clothing; Lung image extraction unit: uses a region growth algorithm to select seed points and perform 8-connected regions Grow to obtain the initial lung contour, and then divide the lungs into left and right lungs, respectively perform convex hull algorithm and expansion to repair the lungs to obtain the lung mask, and convert the original CT Heinz unit images of the lungs into BMP format images. (6) Image segmentation unit: In order to solve the problem of insufficient GPU memory, the input lung 3D image data is cut into a unit size of 256*256 *256*1 4D tensor set carrying position information; Image semantic segmentation unit: input 4D tensor set into TNet lung nodule 3D detection and classification network, through convolution and residual Differential processing, deconvolution, and data fusion layer processing to obtain image semantic segmentation results; (8) Local optical flow tracking correction unit: use optical flow tracking algorithm to locate and track lung nodules, and correct TN et network or data missing Information of malignant nodules to improve the accuracy of recognition; RPN unit: output optical flow tracking results as a 4D tensor, in addition to image data, it also includes anchor point information, lung nodule classification probability (sigmoid function), three-dimensional coordinates and window diameter (10) Pulmonary nodule classification unit: use the fully connected layer and sigmoid function to classify the lung nodules into 7 categories according to the degree of malignancy and size according to the obtained 4D tensor information of the lung nodules: high-risk solid nodules, medium High-risk solid nodules, low-risk solid nodules; high-risk solid nodules, intermediate-risk solid nodules; medium-risk ground-glass density nodules, low-risk ground-glass density nodules; (11) image merging unit : Combine the 4D tensor information output by the fully connected layer classification into a whole lung 3D image; (12) Whole lung optical flow tracking correction unit: Use optical flow tracking algorithm to correct missing and mutual data due to the layered characteristics of CT images Contradictions and nodule information missing from the network detection, generate a complete image with information such as the type, size, and malignant degree of lung nodules; (13) The loss function adds data enhancement and L1 regularization on the basis of the cross-entropy function Operation, the final loss function is: L - Lcls+pLreg Leis is the cross entropy loss term, L reg Is the return loss item: 4 : (6λ - 4 -,, = log(contention) S represents the L1 norm, Gk represents the three-dimensional coordinates and side length of the center point of the frame, and A represents the real nodule and three-dimensional coordinates and side length; (14) Lung nodule core feature extraction unit: extract T0P10 lung nodule data, but sometimes The detection network or CT image will miss some malignant nodules, so we introduce an offset nodule as an error correction, and train the offset nodule in the training phase, and obtain the offset nodule data through the self-learning of the model. Input the above 11 lung nodules into the TNet network to obtain 4D tensor data processed by the lung nodule classification unit, and then extract the center 2*2 data information, and perform maximum pooling to obtain 128D features; (15) Pulmonary nodule cancer probability calculation unit: The double-layer perceptron layer contains 64 hidden units and output units. The output layer activation function uses the sigmoid function, and the type of cancer of the nodule is calculated based on the 128D feature data of the lung nodule. And probability; (16) Lung cancer detection classification unit: Fully connected layer is used to calculate the type and probability of patients suffering from lung cancer. Fully connected includes two hidden layers and 15 output units, which subdivide lung cancer into 15 categories according to basic and mixed types : Basic types: lung adenocarcinoma, squamous cell carcinoma, large cell carcinoma, small cell carcinoma; mixed type II: lung adenocarcinoma + squamous cell carcinoma, lung adenocarcinoma + large cell carcinoma, lung adenocarcinoma + small cell carcinoma, Squamous cell carcinoma + large cell carcinoma, squamous cell carcinoma + small cell carcinoma, large cell carcinoma + small cell carcinoma; mixed type II: lung adenocarcinoma + squamous cell carcinoma + large cell carcinoma, lung adenocarcinoma + squamous epithelium Carcinoma + small cell carcinoma, lung adenocarcinoma + large cell carcinoma + small cell carcinoma, squamous epithelial carcinoma + large cell carcinoma + small cell carcinoma; mixed type IV: lung adenocarcinoma + squamous epithelial carcinoma + large cell carcinoma + small cell cancer. 4. An integrated device and system for early lung cancer detection and classification based on deep learning according to claim 1, wherein the early lung cancer detection case storage device in the module (3) specifically includes: (1) confirmed cases Library module: Store the patient's diagnosis report and synchronize it to the hospital's PACS system in time; (2) Model self-learning case library module: Store the cases with differences between the test report and the diagnosis report, use it for model self-learning, and update the early lung cancer detection server.

title: A METHOD OF TRANSFORMING AND SEGMENTING MEDICAL PAPERS BASED ON GENERATING CONFRONTATION NETWORK; 一种基于生成对抗网络的转化和分割医学卷的方法
abstract:
本发明中提出的一种基于生成对抗网络的转化和分割医学卷的方法，其主要内容包括：合成数据的获得、生成器和分割器的相互作用、完全目标和生成对抗网络的架构，其过程为，先用生成对抗网络的循环一致性损失函数对生成器进行训练，以强制重建合成数据，从而减少合成图像的几何失真；然后，用两个辅助映射，即分割器，来控制合成数据的几何不变性，以保证生成器的合成图像的形状一致性；最后，用在生成器中产生的合成数据对分割器进行扩增，使其成为多模分割器以实现高效的卷分割。本方法相比传统方法能学习非成对数据，实现了图像集合形状的一致性并且能使用合成数据提升分割效率，从而实现了高效地合成清晰3D医学图像的目标。

The method of transforming and segmenting medical volumes based on the generation of confrontation network proposed in the present invention includes: the acquisition of synthetic data, the interaction of generators and segmenters, the complete target and the structure of the generation confrontation network, and the process Therefore, the generator is trained with the cyclic consistency loss function of the generative confrontation network to force the reconstruction of the synthetic data, thereby reducing the geometric distortion of the synthetic image; then, two auxiliary mappings, namely the splitter, are used to control the synthetic data Geometric invariance to ensure the shape consistency of the composite image of the generator; finally, the composite data generated in the generator is used to amplify the splitter to make it a multi-mode splitter to achieve efficient volume segmentation. Compared with the traditional method, this method can learn unpaired data, realize the consistency of the shape of the image set, and can use the synthesized data to improve the segmentation efficiency, thereby achieving the goal of efficiently synthesizing clear 3D medical images.

title: METHOD AND EQUIPMENT FOR CLASSIFYING BRAIN ABNORMALITIES BASED ON 3D NUCLEAR MAGNETIC RESONANCE IMAGES; 一种基于3D核磁共振影像的脑部异常的分类方法及设备
abstract:
本申请公开了一种基于3D核磁共振影像的脑部异常的分类方法及设备，包括：接收待处理的3D核磁共振影像，基于第一神经网络算法对所述3D核磁共振影像对应的影像序列执行卷积操作，得到分段掩码；进而基于第二神经网络算法和所述分段掩码对所述3D核磁共振影像对应的影像序列执行分类操作，得到脑部异常分类结果。本申请实施例借助人工智能和大数据处理技术，通过训练核磁共振影像的识别模型，能够对接收到的核磁共振影像中出现的脑部异常进行分类，有效提升了脑部异常的分类精度，进而提高了基于核磁共振影像对脑部异常的诊断精度。

This application discloses a method and equipment for classifying brain abnormalities based on 3D MRI images, including: receiving 3D MRI images to be processed, and executing an image sequence corresponding to the 3D MRI images based on a first neural network algorithm A convolution operation is performed to obtain a segmented mask; and a classification operation is performed on the image sequence corresponding to the 3D MRI image based on the second neural network algorithm and the segmented mask to obtain a brain abnormality classification result. The embodiments of this application rely on artificial intelligence and big data processing technology to train the recognition model of MRI images to classify brain abnormalities appearing in received MRI images, which effectively improves the classification accuracy of brain abnormalities, and furthermore Improved the diagnostic accuracy of brain abnormalities based on MRI images.
claims:

title: METHOD AND EQUIPMENT FOR CLASSIFYING BRAIN ABNORMALITIES BASED ON 3D NUCLEAR MAGNETIC RESONANCE IMAGES; 一种基于3D核磁共振影像的脑部异常的分类方法及设备
abstract:
本申请公开了一种基于3D核磁共振影像的脑部异常的分类方法及设备，包括：接收待处理的3D核磁共振影像，基于第一神经网络算法对所述3D核磁共振影像对应的影像序列执行卷积操作，得到分段掩码；进而基于第二神经网络算法和所述分段掩码对所述3D核磁共振影像对应的影像序列执行分类操作，得到脑部异常分类结果。本申请实施例借助人工智能和大数据处理技术，通过训练核磁共振影像的识别模型，能够对接收到的核磁共振影像中出现的脑部异常进行分类，有效提升了脑部异常的分类精度，进而提高了基于核磁共振影像对脑部异常的诊断精度。

This application discloses a method and equipment for classifying brain abnormalities based on 3D MRI images, including: receiving 3D MRI images to be processed, and executing an image sequence corresponding to the 3D MRI images based on a first neural network algorithm A convolution operation is performed to obtain a segmented mask; and a classification operation is performed on the image sequence corresponding to the 3D MRI image based on the second neural network algorithm and the segmented mask to obtain a brain abnormality classification result. The embodiments of this application rely on artificial intelligence and big data processing technology to train the recognition model of MRI images to classify brain abnormalities appearing in received MRI images, which effectively improves the classification accuracy of brain abnormalities, and furthermore Improved the diagnostic accuracy of brain abnormalities based on MRI images.
claims:
1 · 一种基于3D核磁共振影像的脑部异常的分类方法，其特征在于，包括： 接收待处理的3D核磁共振影像，基于第一神经网络算法对所述3D核磁共振影像对应的 影像序列执行卷积操作,得到分段掩码； 基于第二神经网络算法和所述分段掩码对所述3D核磁共振影像对应的影像序列执行 分类操作，得到脑部异常分类结果。 2. 根据权利要求1所述的分类方法，其特征在于，基于第一神经网络算法对所述3D核磁 共振影像对应的影像序列执行卷积操作,得到分段掩码,包括： 基于Unet神经网络算法，对所述3D核磁共振影像对应的影像序列执行卷积操作，分别 得到每次卷积操作对应的分段掩码。 3. 根据权利要求2所述的分类方法,其特征在于,对所述3D核磁共振影像对应的影像序 列执行卷积操作，分别得到每次卷积操作对应的分段掩码，包括： 对所述3D核磁共振影像对应的影像序列执行第1层卷积操作,得到第1层对应的分段掩 码Ml； 对所述分段掩码Ml执行第2层卷积操作,得到第2层对应的分段掩码M2； 对所述分段掩码M2执行第m+Ι层卷积操作,得到第m+Ι层对应的分段掩码Μ (m+Ι)，其中， m为大于2的自然数； 对所述分段掩码Mm+1执行第η层卷积操作,得到第η层对应的分段掩码Μη ； 其中,η为大于m+Ι的自然数。 4. 根据权利要求3所述的分类方法,其特征在于,所述分段掩码与卷积操作对应的卷积 层值之间满足： 所述卷积层值从1至n/2,每层对应的所述分段掩码的矩阵行或列数值逐渐减小； 所述卷积层值从n/2至η,每层对应的所述分段掩码的矩阵行或列数值逐渐增加； 其中，当所述卷积层值为η/2时，所述分段掩码对应的矩阵行或列数值最小。 5. 根据权利要求2至4任一项所述的分类方法,其特征在于,在基于第二神经网络算法 和所述分段掩码对所述3D核磁共振影像对应的影像序列执行分类操作之前,所述方法还包 括： 按照不同所述分段掩码的生成时间的先后顺序,对所述分段掩码进行排序。 6. 根据权利要求5所述的分类方法，其特征在于，按照不同所述分段掩码的生成时间的 先后顺序,对所述分段掩码进行排序,包括： 将所述卷积层值从η/2至η分别对应的分段掩码，按照卷积层值从大到小的顺序进行排 列，得到排序结果。 7. 根据权利要求6所述的分类方法,其特征在于，基于第二神经网络算法和所述分段掩 码对所述3D核磁共振影像对应的影像序列执行分类操作,得到脑部异常分类结果,包括： 基于第二神经网络算法和所述排序结果对应的所述分段掩码,对所述3D核磁共振影像 对应的影像序列执行卷积操作，得到卷积结果； 根据所述卷积结果对脑部异常进行识别和分类。 8. 根据权利要求7所述的分类方法，其特征在于，基于第二神经网络算法和各层对应的 分段掩码,对所述3D核磁共振影像对应的影像序列执行卷积操作,得到卷积结果,包括： 基于第二神经网络算法和第η层对应的分段掩码Μη,对所述3D核磁共振影像对应的影 像序列执行卷积操作,得到第一卷积结果； 基于第二神经网络算法和第n-l层对应的分段掩码Mn-l,对所述第一卷积结果执行卷 积操作，得到第二卷积结果； 基于第二神经网络算法和第n-m层对应的分段掩码Mn-m,对所述第m-l卷积结果执行卷 积操作,得到第m卷积结果,其中,m为大于等于n/2的自然数。 9. 根据权利要求8所述的分类方法,其特征在于,得到脑部异常分类结果,包括： 根据所述第m卷积结果对脑部异常进行分类,得到分类结果。 10. —种基于3D核磁共振影像的脑部异常的分类设备，其特征在于，包括至少一个处理 器及存储器，所述存储器存储有程序,并且被配置成由所述至少一个处理器执行以下步骤： 接收待处理的3D核磁共振影像，基于第一神经网络算法对所述3D核磁共振影像对应的 影像序列执行卷积操作,得到分段掩码； 基于第二神经网络算法和所述分段掩码对所述3D核磁共振影像对应的影像序列执行 分类操作，得到脑部异常分类结果。

title: A FULLY AUTOMATIC PELVIC TUMOR SEGMENTATION METHOD AND SYSTEM, STORAGE MEDIUM AND TERMINAL; 一种全自动骨盆肿瘤分割方法及系统、存储介质及终端
abstract:
本发明提供一种全自动骨盆肿瘤分割方法及系统、存储介质及终端，包括以下步骤：对脑膜瘤图像集中的图像进行预处理和数据扩增，得到脑膜瘤训练数据；基于所述脑膜瘤训练数据训练U‑net全卷积神经网络；对骨盆肿瘤图像集中的绘制有肿瘤边界金标准的骨盆肿瘤图像进行预处理和数据扩增，得到骨盆肿瘤训练数据；基于所述骨盆肿瘤训练数据对训练得到的U‑net全卷积神经网络进行微调，得到最优U‑net全卷积神经网络；将采集到的骨盆肿瘤图像输入所述最优U‑net全卷积神经网络，获取骨盆肿瘤分割结果。本发明的全自动骨盆肿瘤分割方法及系统、存储介质及终端通过迁移学习的U‑net全卷积神经网络来实现全自动的骨盆肿瘤分割，从而大幅提高医工交互效率和骨盆肿瘤分割的精确度。

The invention provides an automatic pelvic tumor segmentation method and system, storage medium and terminal, comprising the following steps: preprocessing and data amplification of images in a meningioma image set to obtain meningioma training data; training data based on the meningioma Data training Unet full convolutional neural network; preprocessing and data amplification are performed on the pelvic tumor images with the tumor boundary gold standard drawn in the pelvic tumor image set to obtain pelvic tumor training data; based on the pelvic tumor training data The obtained U-net fully convolutional neural network is fine-tuned to obtain the optimal U-net fully convolutional neural network; the collected pelvic tumor images are input into the optimal U-net fully convolutional neural network to obtain pelvic tumor segmentation result. The fully automatic pelvic tumor segmentation method and system, storage medium and terminal of the present invention realize fully automatic pelvic tumor segmentation through the U-net full convolutional neural network of migration learning, thereby greatly improving the efficiency of medical-engineering interaction and the accuracy of pelvic tumor segmentation Spend.

title: AUTOMATIC PELVIC TUMOR SEGMENTATION METHOD AND SYSTEM, STORAGE MEDIUM AND TERMINAL; 一种全自动骨盆肿瘤分割方法及系统、存储介质及终端
abstract:
本发明提供一种全自动骨盆肿瘤分割方法及系统、存储介质及终端，包括以下步骤：对脑膜瘤图像集中的图像进行预处理和数据扩增，得到脑膜瘤训练数据；基于所述脑膜瘤训练数据训练U‑net全卷积神经网络；对骨盆肿瘤图像集中的绘制有肿瘤边界金标准的骨盆肿瘤图像进行预处理和数据扩增，得到骨盆肿瘤训练数据；基于所述骨盆肿瘤训练数据对训练得到的U‑net全卷积神经网络进行微调，得到最优U‑net全卷积神经网络；将采集到的骨盆肿瘤图像输入所述最优U‑net全卷积神经网络，获取骨盆肿瘤分割结果。本发明的全自动骨盆肿瘤分割方法及系统、存储介质及终端通过迁移学习的U‑net全卷积神经网络来实现全自动的骨盆肿瘤分割，从而大幅提高医工交互效率和骨盆肿瘤分割的精确度。

The present invention provides an automatic pelvic tumor segmentation method and system, storage medium and terminal, including the following steps: preprocessing and data amplification of images in a meningioma image collection to obtain meningioma training data; based on the meningioma training Data training U-net full convolutional neural network; preprocessing and data amplification of the pelvic tumor images in the pelvic tumor image set with the gold standard for drawing the tumor boundary to obtain pelvic tumor training data; training data based on the pelvic tumor training data Fine-tune the obtained U-net fully convolutional neural network to obtain the optimal U-net fully convolutional neural network; input the collected pelvic tumor image into the optimal U-net fully convolutional neural network to obtain pelvic tumor segmentation result. The fully automatic pelvic tumor segmentation method and system, storage medium and terminal of the present invention realize fully automatic pelvic tumor segmentation through the U-net full convolutional neural network of migration learning, thereby greatly improving the efficiency of medical-labor interaction and the accuracy of pelvic tumor segmentation degree.

title: DEVICE AND METHOD FOR SEGMENTATION OF LOW-FIELD-STRENGTH STOMACH MRI IMAGE; 一种低场强胃部MRI图像的分割装置及方法
abstract:
本发明公开了一种低场强胃部核磁共振成像MRI图像的分割装置及方法，其实现的思路是：标注待分割的低场强胃部核磁共振成像MRI图像；将低场强胃部核磁共振成像MRI图像及其对应的标注图像进行扩充；将低场强胃部核磁共振成像MRI图像的像素值映射到区间[0,1]；构建一个w‑U‑Net分割网络；用归一化后的图像训练w‑U‑Net分割网络；利用训练好的w‑U‑Net分割网络分割出低场强胃部核磁共振成像MRI图像中的胃部区域。本发明构建的w‑U‑Net分割网络利用加权交叉熵损失函数，区别对待胃部区域和非胃部区域的分类损失，使得胃部区域分类错误具有更高的损失，对低场强胃部核磁共振成像MRI图像中的胃部区域定位更加准确，分割精度更高、速度更快。

The invention discloses a device and a method for segmenting low-field-strength gastric MRI images. The idea of realization is: labeling low-field-strength gastric MRI images to be segmented; combining low-field-strength stomach MRI images; Resonance imaging MRI images and their corresponding annotation images are expanded; the pixel values of low-field gastric MRI MRI images are mapped to the interval [0,1]; a wUNet segmentation network is constructed; normalization is used The following image trains the w-U-Net segmentation network; the trained w-U-Net segmentation network is used to segment the stomach region in the low-field gastric MRI image. The w-U-Net segmentation network constructed by the present invention uses a weighted cross-entropy loss function to treat the classification loss of the stomach region and the non-stomach region differently, so that the classification error of the stomach region has a higher loss, and the lower field strength stomach The location of the stomach region in the MRI image of MRI is more accurate, with higher segmentation accuracy and faster speed.

title: A METHOD AND SYSTEM FOR AUTOMATIC EVALUATION OF CURATIVE EFFECT OF NASOPHARYNGEAL CARCINOMA; 一种鼻咽癌疗效的自动评测方法及系统
abstract:
本发明公开了一种鼻咽癌疗效的自动评测方法及系统，方法包括：采用深度学习算法对鼻咽癌图像进行病灶分割，得到疗前鼻咽癌病灶和疗后鼻咽癌病灶；将疗后鼻咽癌病灶配准至疗前鼻咽癌病灶，得到已配准的疗后鼻咽癌病灶；根据疗前鼻咽癌病灶和已配准的疗后鼻咽癌病灶采用疗效自动评测算法进行疗效自动评测，输出疗效评测结果。本发明通过配准来使得疗后鼻咽癌图像与疗前鼻咽癌图像处于同一图像空间内，更有利于精确地计算疗前疗后病灶差异；采用深度学习算法对鼻咽癌图像进行病灶分割，能自动从原鼻咽癌图像分割出病灶，更加精准；采用疗效自动评测算法进行疗效自动评测，能自动得出疗效评价结果，更加快速和精准，可广泛应用于医学计算机应用领域。

The invention discloses an automatic evaluation method and system for the curative effect of nasopharyngeal carcinoma. The method includes: using a deep learning algorithm to segment nasopharyngeal carcinoma images to obtain pre-treatment nasopharyngeal carcinoma lesions and post-treatment nasopharyngeal carcinoma lesions; Post-treatment nasopharyngeal carcinoma lesions are registered to pre-treatment nasopharyngeal carcinoma lesions, and the registered post-treatment nasopharyngeal carcinoma lesions are obtained; according to the pre-treatment nasopharyngeal carcinoma lesions and the registered post-treatment nasopharyngeal carcinoma lesions, an automatic efficacy evaluation algorithm is used Perform automatic efficacy evaluation and output efficacy evaluation results. In the present invention, the post-treatment nasopharyngeal carcinoma image and the pre-treatment nasopharyngeal carcinoma image are in the same image space through registration, which is more conducive to accurately calculating the difference between the pre-treatment and post-treatment lesions; the deep learning algorithm is used to perform the lesion analysis on the nasopharyngeal carcinoma image. Segmentation can automatically segment the lesions from the original nasopharyngeal carcinoma image, which is more accurate; using the automatic efficacy evaluation algorithm to automatically evaluate the efficacy, the efficacy evaluation results can be automatically obtained, which is faster and more accurate, and can be widely used in the field of medical computer applications.

将T1图像的第N1特征图和T2图像的第N2特征图经过第二采样块处理后得到融合的特 征图； 将融合的特征图依次经过第1至第N2个第三采样块处理后得到候选的病灶分割结果 图； 将候选的病灶分割结果图进行卷积处理，得到最终的病灶分割结果图； 其中，N1和N2均为正整数，T1图像的第N1特征图与T2图像的第N2特征图的大小相同，第 一采样块包括一个卷积层、一个组归一化层和一个带泄露的修正线性单元，第二采样块包 括2个第一采样块和一个池化层，第三采样块包括一个上采样层、一个连接层和3个第一采 样块，第1至第N2个第三采样块的连接层分别与T2图像的第N2至第1特征图对应连接。 5 .根据权利要求1所述的一种鼻咽癌疗效的自动评测方法，其特征在于:所述根据疗前 鼻咽癌病灶和已配准的疗后鼻咽癌病灶采用疗效自动评测算法进行疗效自动评测，输出疗 效评测结果这一步骤，具体包括： 根据疗前鼻咽癌病灶计算每个疗前病灶的长直径与短直径之和； 根据已配准的疗后鼻咽癌病灶计算每个疗后病灶的长直径与短直径之和； 根据每个疗前病灶的长直径与短直径之和以及每个疗后病灶的长直径与短直径之和 进行疗效自动评价； 输出疗效自动评价结果。 6 下一步骤； 判断所有疗后病灶的长直径与短直径之和是否比疗前所有病灶的长直径与短直径之 和减少了至少30 %，若是，判定疗效自动评价结果为部分缓解，反之,则执行下一步骤； 判断所有疗后病灶的长直径与短直径之和是否比疗前所有病灶的长直径与短直径之 和增加了至少20%,且长直径与短直径之和的绝对值增加了至少5mm,若是，则判定疗效自 动评价结果为疾病进展，反之,则判定疗效自动评价结果为疾病稳定。 7 输入单元，用于输入鼻咽癌图像，其中所述鼻咽癌图像包括疗前鼻咽癌图像和疗后鼻 咽癌图像； 病灶分割单元，用于采用全卷积神经网络对鼻咽癌图像进行病灶分割，得到鼻咽癌病 灶，其中所述鼻咽癌病灶包括疗前鼻咽癌病灶和疗后鼻咽癌病灶。 9 .一种鼻咽癌疗效的自动评测系统，其特征在于:包括： 存储器，用于存储程序； 处理器，用于加载所述程序以执行如权利要求1-6任一项所述的一种鼻咽癌疗效的自 动评测方法。

title: AUTOMATIC EVALUATION METHOD AND SYSTEM FOR CURATIVE EFFECT OF NASOPHARYNGEAL CARCINOMA; 一种鼻咽癌疗效的自动评测方法及系统
abstract:
本发明公开了一种鼻咽癌疗效的自动评测方法及系统，方法包括：采用深度学习算法对鼻咽癌图像进行病灶分割，得到疗前鼻咽癌病灶和疗后鼻咽癌病灶；将疗后鼻咽癌病灶配准至疗前鼻咽癌病灶，得到已配准的疗后鼻咽癌病灶；根据疗前鼻咽癌病灶和已配准的疗后鼻咽癌病灶采用疗效自动评测算法进行疗效自动评测，输出疗效评测结果。本发明通过配准来使得疗后鼻咽癌图像与疗前鼻咽癌图像处于同一图像空间内，更有利于精确地计算疗前疗后病灶差异；采用深度学习算法对鼻咽癌图像进行病灶分割，能自动从原鼻咽癌图像分割出病灶，更加精准；采用疗效自动评测算法进行疗效自动评测，能自动得出疗效评价结果，更加快速和精准，可广泛应用于医学计算机应用领域。

The invention discloses an automatic evaluation method and system for the curative effect of nasopharyngeal cancer. The method includes: using a deep learning algorithm to segment nasopharyngeal cancer images to obtain pre-treatment nasopharyngeal cancer lesions and post-treatment nasopharyngeal cancer lesions; After registration of the posterior nasopharyngeal carcinoma lesions to the pre-treatment nasopharyngeal carcinoma lesions, the registered post-treatment nasopharyngeal carcinoma lesions are obtained; according to the pre-treatment nasopharyngeal carcinoma lesions and the registered post-treatment nasopharyngeal carcinoma lesions, an automatic efficacy evaluation algorithm is adopted Perform automatic efficacy evaluation and output the efficacy evaluation results. The present invention makes the post-treatment nasopharyngeal carcinoma image and the pre-treatment nasopharyngeal carcinoma image in the same image space through registration, which is more conducive to accurately calculating the difference between the pre-treatment and post-treatment lesions; the deep learning algorithm is used to focus the nasopharyngeal carcinoma image Segmentation can automatically segment the lesion from the original nasopharyngeal carcinoma image, which is more accurate; the automatic efficacy evaluation algorithm for automatic efficacy evaluation can automatically obtain the efficacy evaluation result, which is faster and more accurate, and can be widely used in the field of medical computer applications.

title: A BONE AGE EVALUATION METHOD BASED ON TWO-STAGE NEURAL NETWORK; 一种基于两阶段神经网络的骨龄评价方法
abstract:
本发明提供一种基于两阶段神经网络的骨龄评价方法，步骤如下：一：调整原始输入手骨图像大小为512×512，即按比例缩放，并添加边缘信息；二：图像掩模提取；三：生成训练图像；四：对步骤三中生成的图像分别计算二维单尺度小波变换与Canny算子边缘提取，与直方图均衡后的图像共同组成输入样本的三通道；五：对步骤四中生成的三通道图像进行数据增强，扩充数据集大小；六：骨龄预测；通过以上步骤，本检测方法结合图像分割和骨龄预测，能够较好地抑制噪音，比较准确地分割出手骨区域，从而进行骨龄评价；对于其他图像处理领域如目标分割、目标检索、目标回归预测等都有实际应用价值。

The present invention provides a bone age evaluation method based on a two-stage neural network. The steps are as follows: 1. Adjust the size of the original input hand bone image to 512×512, that is, scale proportionally, and add edge information; 2. Image mask extraction; 3. : Generate training images; 4: Calculate the two-dimensional single-scale wavelet transform and Canny operator edge extraction on the images generated in step 3, and form three channels of input samples together with the histogram equalized image; 5: correct step 4 The generated three-channel image is data enhanced to expand the size of the data set; six: bone age prediction; through the above steps, this detection method combines image segmentation and bone age prediction, which can better suppress noise and segment the hand bone area more accurately. Bone age evaluation; it has practical application value for other image processing fields such as target segmentation, target retrieval, target regression prediction, etc.

子边缘提取，与直方图均衡后的图像共同组成输入样本的三通道”，其作法如下： 首先，对图像进行图像的二维离散小波分解，获得图像在水平方向上的低频和垂直方 向上的高频LH、水平方向上的高频和垂直方向上的低频HL,对LH和HL计算平方和后开平方, 由于图像尺度上差异，随后将该图像拉伸为原图像2倍，插值方式为最近邻插值，即得到图 像二维单尺度小波变换结果； 然后，对图像进行Canny算子边缘提取，包括:用高斯滤波器平滑图像;用一阶偏导的有 限差分来计算梯度的幅值和方向；对梯度幅值应用非极大值抑制；用双阈值方法检测和连 接边缘； 最后，将步骤三得到的图像作为输入样本的第一通道，二维单尺度小波变换结果作为 第二通道,Canny算子边缘提取作为第三通道针对后续步骤。 6. 根据权利要求1所述的一种基于两阶段神经网络的骨龄评价方法，其特征在于： 在步骤五中所述的“对步骤四中生成的三通道图像进行数据增强,扩充数据集大小”， 其作法如下:使用深度学习框架Keras中ImageDataGenerator函数进行数据增强，设置数据 提升时图片随机转动的角度为0至10度，图片水平偏移的幅度为0至0.1倍图片宽度,图片垂 直偏移的幅度为0至0.1倍图片高度，图片缩放幅度为1-1.15倍，图片能随机水平翻转。 7. 根据权利要求1所述的一种基于两阶段神经网络的骨龄评价方法，其特征在于： 在步骤六中所述的“搭建多输出骨龄预测网络”，其作法如下： 使用VGG16网络卷积层提取输入图像的特征,然后接入两个1024个神经元的全连接层, 连接层后输出227个二元分类器，第k个分类器判断输入图像的年龄是否大于k个月,满足为 1,不满足为0 ；预测年龄为所有的二元分类器判断结果之和加1,损失函数为对每个二元分 类器计算交叉损失爛,并计算每个类别的权重，权重函数如下， 式中，九代表第k个年龄段分类器的重要性,Nk为第k个分类器的样本数,Κ为228个年龄 最后通过最小化损失函数，得到最终的预测骨龄。

Step 2: Image masking Mode extraction; for the subsequent steps, first, build a pre-trained full convolutional segmentation network; then manually select 100 hand bone X-ray images, manually extract the mask, use it as a training sample, and train by minimizing the loss function J (w) Segmentation network; finally use the trained segmentation network to extract the mask of all input images; where: yn is the binary value (label) of the corresponding pixel, P" is the predicted probability of the pixel, and Ν is the total number of pixels; Step 3: Generate Training image; first use the morphological method to batch process the image mask segmented in step two; calculate the hand bone image after the input image is fused with the mask; finally calculate the histogram equalized image for the fused image; Step 4: Calculate the two-dimensional single-scale wavelet transform and Canny operator edge extraction on the image generated in step three, Together with the histogram equalized image, the three channels of the input sample are formed; Step 5: Perform data enhancement on the three-channel image generated in Step 4 to expand the size of the data set; Step 6: Bone age prediction; First, build a multi-output bone age prediction network; Then select 11000 hand bone X-ray images as training images and 1000 hand bone X-ray images as test images to train the prediction network; finally use the trained network to evaluate the bone age; the evaluation index is the average absolute error MAE, where N represents Enter the number of samples, Lu represents the predicted bone age, Xi represents the actual bone age; through the above steps, this detection method combines image segmentation and bone age prediction, which can better suppress noise and accurately segment the hand bone area, thereby performing bone age evaluation; for other images Processing areas such as target segmentation, target retrieval and target regression prediction have practical application value. 2. A bone age evaluation method based on a two-stage neural network according to claim 1, characterized in that: in the second step, "build a pre-trained full convolutional segmentation network", the method is as follows: construct a U-Net neural network Network, detach part of its encoder, use VGG16 network as its encoder, and use ImageNet pre-training weights to initialize part of encoder weights. 3. A bone age evaluation method based on a two-stage neural network according to claim 1, characterized in that: the "morphological method" described in step 3 is as follows: first use the open operation, that is, first corrode and then expand, Eliminate small objects, separate objects at slender points, and smooth the boundaries of large objects; in addition, the flood fill method fills the holes in the mask target area; finally, the contour with the largest mask area is found as the mask of the hand bone image. 4. A bone age evaluation method based on a two-stage neural network according to claim 1, characterized in that: in step 3, "calculate the hand bone image after the input image is fused with the mask; finally, the fused image Calculate the histogram equalized image", the method is as follows: Multiply the original image and the mask pixel by pixel to obtain the fused hand bone image, Im(X, y) = I(X, y) X Μ (x, y) In the formula, I is the original image, M is the mask, and Im is the fused image; the histogram equalization is performed on the fused image, that is, The pixel gray level of the original image is mapped and transformed, so that the probability density of the gray level of the transformed image is uniformly distributed. In the formula, r represents the gray level of pixels in the image, 0WrWl, n is the total number of pixels in the image, and k is the number of gray levels. 5. A bone age evaluation method based on a two-stage neural network according to claim 1, characterized in that: in step four, two-dimensional single-scale wavelet transform and Canny operator edge are calculated on the image generated in step three. Extraction, together with the image after histogram equalization, form the three channels of the input sample. The method is as follows: First, the image is decomposed by two-dimensional discrete wavelet to obtain the low frequency in the horizontal direction and the high frequency in the vertical direction. LH, the high frequency in the horizontal direction and the low frequency HL in the vertical direction, calculate the sum of squares for LH and HL and then square root. Due to the difference in image scale, the image is then stretched to twice the original image, and the interpolation method is nearest neighbor Interpolation, that is, the result of two-dimensional single-scale wavelet transform of the image is obtained; Then, the edge extraction of the image is performed by the Canny operator, including: smoothing the image with a Gaussian filter; calculating the magnitude and direction of the gradient with the finite difference of the first-order partial derivative; Apply non-maximum suppression to the gradient amplitude; use the dual threshold method to detect and connect the edges; Finally, the image obtained in step 3 is used as the first channel of the input sample, and the result of the two-dimensional single-scale wavelet transform is used as the second channel, and Canny calculates Sub-edge extraction is used as the third pass for subsequent steps. 6. A bone age evaluation method based on a two-stage neural network according to claim 1, characterized in that: in step 5, "data enhancement is performed on the three-channel image generated in step 4 to expand the size of the data set", The method is as follows: use the ImageDataGenerator function in the deep learning framework Keras for data enhancement, set the random rotation angle of the image when the data is increased to 0 to 10 degrees, the horizontal offset of the image is 0 to 0.1 times the image width, and the vertical offset of the image The range is 0 to 0.1 times the height of the picture, the zoom range of the picture is 1-1.15 times, and the picture can be randomly flipped horizontally. 7. A bone age evaluation method based on a two-stage neural network according to claim 1, characterized in that: the method of "building a multi-output bone age prediction network" in step 6 is as follows: Use VGG16 network convolutional layer extraction Input the characteristics of the image, and then connect to two 1024 neuron fully connected layers. After the connected layers, 227 binary classifiers are output. The k-th classifier judges whether the age of the input image is greater than k months, and the satisfaction is 1, Dissatisfaction is 0; the predicted age is the sum of the judgment results of all binary classifiers plus 1, the loss function is to calculate the cross loss for each binary classifier, and calculate the weight of each category, the weight function is as follows, where , Nine represents the importance of the k-th age classifier, Nk is the number of samples of the k-th classifier, and Κ is 228 ages. Finally, the final predicted bone age is obtained by minimizing the loss function.

title: A 3D BREAST IMAGE ANALYSIS METHOD, SYSTEM AND MEDIUM; 一种3D乳腺图像的分析方法及系统、介质
abstract:
本公开提供一种3D乳腺图像的分析方法及相关产品，所述方法包括如下步骤：获取训练的3D乳腺图像，将该训练的3D乳腺图像随机裁剪成设定尺寸的图像块，将该图像块经过数据增加后输入到3D U‑net神经网络中进行训练，训练完成后得到一个乳腺癌病灶自动检测的模型；获取待检测的3D乳腺图像，将该检测的3D乳腺图像按照滑动窗的形式裁剪成设定尺寸的图像块，将所述乳腺癌病灶自动检测的模型进行测试得到图像块测试结果，将该测试结果拼接成待检测的3D乳腺图像尺寸大小的3D乳腺图像检测结果。本申请提供的技术方案具有效率高以及成本低的优点。

The present disclosure provides a 3D breast image analysis method and related products. The method includes the following steps: acquiring a trained 3D breast image, randomly cropping the trained 3D breast image into an image block of a set size, and the image block After the data is increased, it is input into the 3D Unet neural network for training. After the training is completed, a model for automatic detection of breast cancer lesions is obtained; the 3D breast image to be detected is obtained, and the detected 3D breast image is cropped in the form of a sliding window The test results of the image block are obtained by testing the model of the automatic breast cancer lesion detection, and the test results are spliced into a 3D breast image detection result of the size of the 3D breast image to be detected. The technical solution provided by this application has the advantages of high efficiency and low cost.

title: LIVER SEGMENTATION METHOD BASED ON RESIDUAL-ATTENTION DEEP NEURAL NETWORK; 基于残差-注意力深度神经网络的肝脏分割方法
abstract:
本发明公开了一种基于残差‑注意力深度神经网络的肝脏分割方法，包括：数据预处理、训练集制作、构建残差‑注意力深度神经网络模型、训练残差‑注意力深度神经网络和分割阶段，本发明的肿瘤分割方法结合了残差网络中的残差模块，使深度神经网络能更好地处理梯度消失问题。其次，本发明的深度神经网络使用残差‑注意力模块使得处理的性能极大的改善，由于不同类型的注意力被提取出来，因此该分割方法更具有普适性。最后，使用U‑Net作为基本体系结构来捕获多尺度的注意力信息，并将低层特征与高级特征完美集成。

The invention discloses a liver segmentation method based on a residual-attention deep neural network, comprising: data preprocessing, training set production, building a residual-attention deep neural network model, and training a residual-attention deep neural network In the segmentation stage, the tumor segmentation method of the present invention combines the residual module in the residual network, so that the deep neural network can better deal with the problem of gradient disappearance. Secondly, the deep neural network of the present invention uses the residual-attention module to greatly improve the processing performance. Since different types of attention are extracted, the segmentation method is more universal. Finally, UNet is used as the basic architecture to capture multi-scale attention information and integrate low-level features with high-level features perfectly.

title: LIVER SEGMENTATION METHOD BASED ON RESIDUAL-ATTENTION DEPTH NEURAL NETWORK; 基于残差-注意力深度神经网络的肝脏分割方法
abstract:
本发明公开了一种基于残差‑注意力深度神经网络的肝脏分割方法，包括：数据预处理、训练集制作、构建残差‑注意力深度神经网络模型、训练残差‑注意力深度神经网络和分割阶段，本发明的肿瘤分割方法结合了残差网络中的残差模块，使深度神经网络能更好地处理梯度消失问题。其次，本发明的深度神经网络使用残差‑注意力模块使得处理的性能极大的改善，由于不同类型的注意力被提取出来，因此该分割方法更具有普适性。最后，使用U‑Net作为基本体系结构来捕获多尺度的注意力信息，并将低层特征与高级特征完美集成。

The invention discloses a liver segmentation method based on residual-attention depth neural network, including: data preprocessing, training set production, construction of residual-attention depth neural network model, training residual-attention depth neural network In the segmentation stage, the tumor segmentation method of the present invention combines the residual module in the residual network, so that the deep neural network can better deal with the problem of gradient disappearance. Secondly, the deep neural network of the present invention uses the residual-attention module to greatly improve the processing performance. Since different types of attention are extracted, the segmentation method is more universal. Finally, U-Net is used as the basic architecture to capture multi-scale attention information, and the low-level features are perfectly integrated with the high-level features.

title: A RESIDUAL-ATTENTION DEEP NEURAL NETWORK BASED TUMOR SEGMENTATION METHOD; 基于残差-注意力深度神经网络的肿瘤分割方法
abstract:
本发明公开了一种基于残差‑注意力深度神经网络的肿瘤分割方法，包括：数据预处理、训练集制作、构建残差‑注意力深度神经网络模型、训练残差‑注意力深度神经网络和分割阶段，本发明的肿瘤分割方法结合了残差网络中的残差模块，使深度神经网络能更好地处理梯度消失问题。其次，本发明的深度神经网络使用残差‑注意力模块使得处理的性能极大的改善，由于不同类型的注意力被提取出来，因此该分割方法更具有普适性。最后，使用U‑Net作为基本体系结构来捕获多尺度的注意力信息，并将低层特征与高级特征完美集成。

The invention discloses a tumor segmentation method based on residual-attention deep neural network, comprising: data preprocessing, training set preparation, building residual-attention deep neural network model, training residual-attention deep neural network In the segmentation stage, the tumor segmentation method of the present invention combines the residual module in the residual network, so that the deep neural network can better deal with the problem of gradient disappearance. Secondly, the deep neural network of the present invention uses the residual-attention module to greatly improve the processing performance. Since different types of attention are extracted, the segmentation method is more universal. Finally, UNet is used as the basic architecture to capture multi-scale attention information and integrate low-level features with high-level features perfectly.

title: TUMOR SEGMENTATION METHOD BASED ON RESIDUAL-ATTENTION DEPTH NEURAL NETWORK; 基于残差-注意力深度神经网络的肿瘤分割方法
abstract:
本发明公开了一种基于残差‑注意力深度神经网络的肿瘤分割方法，包括：数据预处理、训练集制作、构建残差‑注意力深度神经网络模型、训练残差‑注意力深度神经网络和分割阶段，本发明的肿瘤分割方法结合了残差网络中的残差模块，使深度神经网络能更好地处理梯度消失问题。其次，本发明的深度神经网络使用残差‑注意力模块使得处理的性能极大的改善，由于不同类型的注意力被提取出来，因此该分割方法更具有普适性。最后，使用U‑Net作为基本体系结构来捕获多尺度的注意力信息，并将低层特征与高级特征完美集成。

The invention discloses a tumor segmentation method based on residual-attention-depth neural network, including: data preprocessing, training set production, construction of residual-attention-depth neural network model, training residual-attention-depth neural network In the segmentation stage, the tumor segmentation method of the present invention combines the residual module in the residual network, so that the deep neural network can better deal with the problem of gradient disappearance. Secondly, the deep neural network of the present invention uses the residual-attention module to greatly improve the processing performance. Since different types of attention are extracted, the segmentation method is more universal. Finally, U-Net is used as the basic architecture to capture multi-scale attention information, and the low-level features are perfectly integrated with the high-level features.

title: A NEW METHOD FOR AUTOMATIC SEGMENTATION OF BIOMEDICAL IMAGES BASED ON U-NET NETWORK STRUCTURE; 基于U-NET网络结构的生物医学图像自动分割新方法
abstract:
本发明属于图像处理与计算机视觉技术领域，涉及基于U‑net网络结构的生物医学图像自动分割新方法，包括将生物医学数据集分为训练集和测试集，对测试集和扩增处理后的测试集进行归一化预处理；将训练集的图像输入改进的U‑net网络模型，输出图像经过softmax层生成分类概率图；通过集中性损失函数计算分类概率图与金标准的误差，通过梯度后向传播方法，获得网络模型的权重参数；将测试集中的图像输改进的U‑net网络模型，输出图像经过softmax层生成分类概率图；根据分类概率图中的类别概率，得到图像的分割结果图；本发明解决图像分割过程中简单样本对损失函数的贡献过大以至于不能很好学习困难样本等问题。

The invention belongs to the technical field of image processing and computer vision, and relates to a new method for automatic segmentation of biomedical images based on a U-net network structure. The test set is normalized and preprocessed; the images of the training set are input into the improved U-net network model, and the output image is passed through the softmax layer to generate a classification probability map; the centrality loss function is used to calculate the error between the classification probability map and the gold standard, and the gradient The weight parameters of the network model are obtained by the backward propagation method; the images in the test set are input to the improved U-net network model, and the output image is passed through the softmax layer to generate a classification probability map; according to the class probability in the classification probability map, the image segmentation result is obtained Figure; the present invention solves the problem that the simple samples contribute too much to the loss function so that the difficult samples cannot be learned well in the image segmentation process.
claims:
1 .基于U-net网络结构的生物医学图像自动分割新方法，其特征在于，包括以下步骤： S1：将生物医学数据集分为训练集和测试集，对训练集进行数据扩增处理，并对测试集 和扩增处理后的训练集进行归一化预处理； S2:将训练集的图像输入改进的U-net网络模型，输出图像经过softmax层生成一个通 道数为2的分类概率图，其中分类概率图与输入图像的分辨率相同； S3：通过foca110ss计算分类概率图与金标准的误差，并通过梯度后向传播方法，获得 改进的U-net网络模型的权重参数； S4：将测试集中的图像输入S3中训练好的改进的U - net网络模型，输出图像经过 softmax层生成分类概率图； S5：根据分类概率图中的类别概率，取概率最大的类别作为像素位置的类别，得到图像 的分割结果图； 改进的U-net网络模型包括可变形编码器和具有重构上采样结构的解码器网络组成， 可变形编码器的组成依次包括输入层、第一可变形卷积层、第二可变形卷积层、第一最大池 化层、第三可变形卷积层、第四可变形卷积层、第二最大池化层、第五可变形卷积层、第六可 变形卷积层、第三最大池化层、第七可变形卷积层、第八可变形卷积层、第四最大池化层、第 九可变形卷积层;具有重构上采样结构的解码器网络包括第一常规卷积层、第一重构上采 样层、第二常规卷积层、第三常规卷积层、第二重构上采样层、第四常规卷积层、第五常规卷 积层、第三重构上采样层、第六常规卷积层、第七常规卷积层、第四重构上采样层、第八常规 卷积层、第九常规卷积层、第十常规卷积层即输出层;第一常规卷积层与第九可变形卷积层 连接，第一重构上采样层与第八可变形卷积层进行拼接，第二重构上采样层与第六可变形 卷积层进行拼接，第三重构上采样层与第四可变形卷积层进行拼接，第四重构上采样层与 第二可变形卷积层进行拼接；在每个可变形卷积层和常规卷积层的激活函数之前，均加入 组标准化； 重构上采样层的操作包括： S31：对于分辨率为hXw，通道数为c的特征图，首先通过2c个1X1的卷积将其通道数增 大2倍； S32：S31输出的特征图经过组标准化操作和relu激活函数，得到了hXwX2c的特征图； S33:将S32得到的特征图分为c/2个部分，每个部分为h X w X 4,对每个部分进行重构上 采样，最终生成2hX2wXc/2的特征图，由此完成分辨率扩大两倍，通道数缩小一半的上采 样过程。 2 .根据权利要求1所述的基于U-net网络结构的生物医学图像自动分割新方法，其特征 在于，步骤S1具体包括： S11：将训练集中的图像数据进行旋转，旋转角度在(-20 °，20 °)之间，截取旋转后的图 像数据的最大矩形； S12：将旋转后的图像数据以80%的概率进行上下翻转和左右反转，然后跳至步骤S13： S13：将图像数据以80%的概率进行弹性扭曲，然后跳至步骤S14； S14：将图像数据进行(50%,80%)范围的缩放处理，完成数据扩增处理； S15：计算测试集和扩增处理后的训练集中图像数据的均值和标准差，按对比度归一化 公式处理图像的对比度，其中对比度归一化公式表示为： 1= (I-Mean) /Std； 其中，I表示图像的对比度，Mean表示图像数据的均值,Std表示图像数据的标准差。 3 .根据权利要求1所述的基于U-net网络结构的生物医学图像自动分割新方法，其特征 在于,可变形卷积层的操作包括： S21：将大小为hXwXc的特征图输入可变形卷积层中，使用激活函数为elu的卷积层 对特征图进行卷积； S22 ：将S21中的卷积结果输入激活函数为rule的卷积层进行卷积操作； S23 ：对S22的卷积结果进行重构操作,生成3h X3wX 2的偏移域； S24：利用偏移域对特征图进行双线性插值,生成3h X 3wX c的特征图； 525：将3卜> 4 .根据权利要求1所述的基于U-net网络结构的生物医学图像自动分割新方法，其特征 在于，集中性损失函数表示为： 5 = Ζ(-α · (1 - p(x)y ·兴x)bg p(x) — - y(x))bg(l — P(x))). 其中，a为常数，为应对类别不平衡的因子；y为控制难易样本对损失函数的贡献差距 的参数，且v >0；y(x)表示输入特征图x；p(X)表示输入特征图X的像素点，Ω为输入特征图 X的值域。

A new method for automatic segmentation of biomedical images based on U-net network structure, characterized in that it comprises the following steps: S1: Divide the biomedical data set into a training set and a test set, perform data augmentation processing on the training set, and perform normalization preprocessing on the test set and the augmented training set; S2: input the image of the training set into the improved U-net network model, and the output image generates a classification probability map with a channel number of 2 through the softmax layer, wherein the classification probability map has the same resolution as the input image; S3: Calculate the error between the classification probability map and the gold standard through foca110ss, and obtain the weight parameters of the improved U-net network model through the gradient back propagation method; S4: Input the images in the test set into the improved U-net network model trained in S3, and the output image will pass through the softmax layer to generate a classification probability map; S5: According to the category probability in the classification probability map, take the category with the highest probability as the category of the pixel position, and obtain the image segmentation result map; the improved U-net network model includes a deformable encoder and a decoding with a reconstructed upsampling structure The composition of the deformable encoder consists of an input layer, a first deformable convolutional layer, a second deformable convolutional layer, a first maximum pooling layer, a third deformable convolutional layer, and a fourth deformable convolutional layer. title: CANCER CELL IDENTIFICATION METHOD BASED ON IMPROVED U-NET CONVOLUTIONAL NEURAL NETWORK MODEL; 基于改进U-NET卷积神经网络模型的癌细胞识别方法
abstract:
本发明公开了一种基于改进U‑net卷积神经网络模型的癌细胞检测方法。该方法为：获取癌细胞的医学图像，对于医学图像进行处理，对医学图像中的癌细胞进行标注，构成带有标注的数据集，并将数据集分为训练集、验证集、测试集三个部分；构建U‑net卷积神经网络模型，确定U‑net卷积神经网络模型的参数，在U‑net卷积神经网络模型中载入测试集和验证集，通过深度学习方法从图像上进行特征学习，采用测试和验证相结合的方式，得到训练好的U‑net卷积神经网络模型；将训练好的U‑net卷积神经网络模型进行部署，用于对测试集中的癌细胞进行自动检测。本发明利用底部特征，直接从图像上进行特征学习，有较高的运行效率和自动检测准确度。

The invention discloses a cancer cell detection method based on an improved U-net convolutional neural network model. The method is: acquiring medical images of cancer cells, processing the medical images, labeling the cancer cells in the medical images, forming a labeled data set, and dividing the data set into training set, validation set, and test set. Parts; construct the U-net convolutional neural network model, determine the parameters of the U-net convolutional neural network model, load the test set and the verification set into the U-net convolutional neural network model, and use the deep learning method to learn from the image Perform feature learning, and use a combination of testing and verification to obtain a trained U-net convolutional neural network model; deploy the trained U-net convolutional neural network model for cancer cells in the test set automatic detection. The invention uses bottom features to directly learn features from the image, and has higher operating efficiency and automatic detection accuracy.
claims:
1· 一种基于改进u-net卷积神经网络模型的癌细胞检测方法，其特征在于，包括以下步 骤： 步骤1、获取癌细胞的医学图像； 步骤2、对于医学图像进行处理，对医学图像中的癌细胞进行标注，从而构成训练U-net 神经网络模型所需的带有标注的数据集，将标注好的数据集分为训练集、验证集、测试集三 个部分； 步骤3、构建U-net卷积神经网络模型，确定U-net卷积神经网络模型的参数，在U-net卷 积神经网络模型中载入测试集和验证集,通过深度学习方法从图像上进行特征学习，采用 测试和验证相结合的方式,得到训练好的U-net卷积神经网络模型； 步骤4、将训练好的U-net卷积神经网络模型进行部署，用于对测试集中的癌细胞进行 自动检测。 2. 根据权利要求1所述的基于改进U-net卷积神经网络模型的癌细胞检测方法,其特征 在于，步骤2中所述的对于医学图像进行处理，对医学图像中的癌细胞进行标注，从而构成 训练U-net神经网络模型所需的带有标注的数据集，将标注好的数据集分为训练集、验证 集、测试集三个部分，具体如下： 步骤2.1、使用全局阈值分割,将给定的灰度值作为阈值，将处理出的图片作为标签,对 于医学图像进行处理； 步骤2.2、对医学图像进行去噪处理； 步骤2.3、对医学图像进行连通区域的检测； 步骤2.4、将处理出来的二值化医学图像作为标注，和原医学图像一起构成数据集； 步骤2.5、将处理好的数据集分为训练集、验证集、测试集三个部分;其中训练集用于构 建模型，验证集用于验证模型，测试集用于对模型进行测试。 3. 根据权利要求1所述的基于改进U-net卷积神经网络模型的癌细胞检测方法,其特征 在于，步骤3中所述的构建U-net卷积神经网络模型，确定U-net卷积神经网络模型的参数, 在U-net卷积神经网络模型中载入测试集和验证集，通过深度学习方法从图像上进行特征 学习，采用测试和验证相结合的方式,得到训练好的U-net卷积神经网络模型，具体如下： 步骤3.1、构建一个U-net卷积神经网络模型： 首先通过卷积和池化进行下采样；然后通过融合之前底层的特征图，实现反卷积上采 样，重复上采样直到获得输出最后的结果;接着通过激活函数获得输出图像的像素分割，将 特征的维度拼接在一起;最后对每个像素点进行类型判别； 步骤3.2、确定U-net卷积神经网络模型的参数： 将训练集中的数据随机载入U-net卷积神经网络中，使用深度学习的方法直接从图像 序列上进行U-net卷积网络模型训练； 步骤3.3、训练U-net卷积神经网络模型： 使用多重交叉验证的方法，对U-net卷积神经网络模型训练过程中的误差值进行记录, 当验证集的误差不再下降的时候，停止训练，保存当前的权重值作为训练好的U-net卷积神 经网络模型的参数，之后使用测试集对U-net卷积神经网络模型进行性能测试，如果训练集 上的性能差异大于阈值，则调整学习率直到找到泛化满足要求的模型参数。

The labeled data set is divided into three parts: training set, validation set, and test set; Step 3. Construction U-net convolutional neural network model, determine the parameters of the U-net convolutional neural network model, load the test set and verification set in the U-net convolutional neural network model, and perform feature learning from the image through the deep learning method. Using a combination of testing and verification, a trained U-net convolutional neural network model is obtained; Step 4. The trained U-net convolutional neural network model is deployed to automate the cancer cells in the test set Detection. 2. The cancer cell detection method based on the improved U-net convolutional neural network model according to claim 1, wherein the medical image is processed in step 2 to label the cancer cells in the medical image, thereby To form the labeled data set required to train the U-net neural network model, the labeled data set is divided into three parts: training set, validation set, and test set. The details are as follows: Step 2.1. Use global threshold segmentation. The given gray value is used as the threshold, and the processed picture is used as the label to process the medical image; Step 2.2, denoise the medical image; Step 2.3, detect the connected area of the medical image; Step 2.4, The processed binary medical image is used as an annotation, and forms a data set together with the original medical image; Step 2.5: The processed data set is divided into three parts: training set, validation set, and test set; the training set is used to build the model , The validation set is used to verify the model, and the test set is used to test the model. 3. title: METHOD AND SYSTEM FOR LOCATING TARGET AREA IN MEDICAL IMAGES; 医学图像目标区域定位方法及系统
abstract:
本发明公开了一种医学图像目标区域定位方法及系统，其方法包括：使用图像分割网络对预先收集的预设张数的医学图像进行模型训练，构建相应的训练模型；将构建的训练模型用于需要进行目标区域定位的当前医学图像，对当前医学图像进行图像分割，获取分割概率图；采用巴特沃斯滤波器对分割后的分割概率图进行巴特沃斯数字图像处理，得到滤波概率图；采用区域生长法对滤波概率图进行定位，获取相应的定位区域。其通过将巴特沃斯滤波器与深度学习网络模型结合在一起，加强了对网络模型输出端的处理，使得网络模型在对未见过的样本上具有较强的适用性，一定程度上弥补了医学图像训练数据少、影像形态丰富等因素而导致的模型缺陷。

The invention discloses a method and system for locating a medical image target area. The method includes: using an image segmentation network to perform model training on a preset number of medical images collected in advance, and constructing a corresponding training model; For the current medical image that needs to locate the target area, perform image segmentation on the current medical image to obtain a segmentation probability map; use Butterworth filter to perform Butterworth digital image processing on the segmented segmentation probability map to obtain a filtering probability map; The region growing method is used to locate the filtered probability map to obtain the corresponding location area. By combining the Butterworth filter with the deep learning network model, it strengthens the processing of the output end of the network model, making the network model more applicable to unseen samples, making up for the medical treatment to a certain extent. Model defects caused by factors such as less image training data and rich image forms.

title: MEDICAL IMAGE TARGET REGION POSITIONING METHOD AND SYSTEM; 医学图像目标区域定位方法及系统
abstract:
本发明公开了一种医学图像目标区域定位方法及系统，其方法包括：使用图像分割网络对预先收集的预设张数的医学图像进行模型训练，构建相应的训练模型；将构建的训练模型用于需要进行目标区域定位的当前医学图像，对当前医学图像进行图像分割，获取分割概率图；采用巴特沃斯滤波器对分割后的分割概率图进行巴特沃斯数字图像处理，得到滤波概率图；采用区域生长法对滤波概率图进行定位，获取相应的定位区域。其通过将巴特沃斯滤波器与深度学习网络模型结合在一起，加强了对网络模型输出端的处理，使得网络模型在对未见过的样本上具有较强的适用性，一定程度上弥补了医学图像训练数据少、影像形态丰富等因素而导致的模型缺陷。

The invention discloses a method and system for locating a medical image target area. The method includes: using an image segmentation network to perform model training on a preset number of medical images collected in advance, and constructing a corresponding training model; using the constructed training model Perform image segmentation of the current medical image to obtain the segmentation probability map for the current medical image that needs to be located in the target area; use the Butterworth filter to perform Butterworth digital image processing on the segmentation probability map after the segmentation to obtain the filtered probability map; The area growing method is used to locate the filtered probability map, and the corresponding location area is obtained. It strengthens the processing of the output end of the network model by combining the Butterworth filter with the deep learning network model, making the network model more applicable to unseen samples, and to a certain extent compensates for the medical Model defects caused by factors such as lack of image training data and rich image morphology.

title: MEDICAL IMAGE PROCESSING METHOD, DEVICE, SYSTEM AND STORAGE MEDIUM; 医学图像处理方法、装置、系统和存储介质
abstract:
本发明涉及一种医学图像的处理方法、装置、系统和存储介质。该方法包括：获取检测图像，所述检测图像包括黑质区域和/或红核区域的图像；获取分割神经网络模型，采用所述分割神经网络模型对所述检测图像进行分割操作，得到目标掩模图像；获取检测神经网络模型，采用所述检测神经网络模型对所述目标掩模图像进行检测，得到检测结果。该方法能够根据训练好的检测神经网络模型对检测图像做出更加准确的检测结果，进一步提高检测结果的准确率。

The invention relates to a medical image processing method, device, system and storage medium. The method includes: acquiring a detection image, the detection image including an image of a substantia nigra region and/or a red nucleus region; acquiring a segmentation neural network model, and using the segmentation neural network model to perform a segmentation operation on the detection image to obtain a target mask Model image; obtain a detection neural network model, use the detection neural network model to detect the target mask image, and obtain a detection result. This method can make more accurate detection results on the detected images according to the trained detection neural network model, and further improve the accuracy of the detection results.
claims:
1. 一种医学图像处理方法，其特征在于，所述方法包括： 获取检测图像，所述检测图像包括黑质区域和/或红核区域的图像； 获取分割神经网络模型，采用所述分割神经网络模型对所述检测图像进行分割操作， 得到目标掩模图像； 获取检测神经网络模型，采用所述检测神经网络模型对所述目标掩模图像进行检测， 得到检测结果。 2. 根据权利要求1所述的方法，其特征在于，在所述获取检测神经网络模型之前，所述 方法还包括： 获取训练数据集，所述训练数据集包括多对训练数据，每一对训练数据包括一个训练 掩模图像和所述训练掩模图像对应的真实标签； 根据所述训练数据集对预设的初始检测神经网络模型进行训练，得到所述检测神经网 络模型。 3. 根据权利要求2所述的方法，其特征在于，所述根据所述训练数据集对预设的初始检 测神经网络模型进行训练，得到所述检测神经网络模型，包括： 将所述训练掩模图像输入至所述初始检测神经网络模型，得到初始标签； 判定所述初始标签与所述真实标签的误差是否小于预设阈值；以及响应于所述误差小 于预设阈值的判定，将所述初始检测神经网络模型指定为所述检测神经网络模型。 4. 根据权利要求3所述的方法，其特征在于，所述初始检测神经网络模型包括特征提取 组和分类组； 所述特征提取组包括第一卷积层，所述分类组包括第二卷积层、池化层和全连接层； 所述将所述训练掩模图像输入至所述初始检测神经网络模型，得到初始标签，包括： 基于所述特征提取组，得到所述训练掩模图像对应的检测特征图； 基于所述分类组和所述检测特征图，得到所述训练掩模图像对应的所述初始标签。 5. 根据权利要求1所述的方法，其特征在于，所述采用预设的分割神经网络模型对所述 检测图像进行分割操作，得到目标掩模图像，包括： 将所述检测图像输入至所述分割神经网络模型，得到目标分割图像； 根据所述目标分割图像和所述检测图像的乘积，得到所述目标掩模图像。 6. 根据权利要求5所述的方法，其特征在于，所述分割神经网络模型为V-Net模型、UNet模型、FCN模型、GAN模型中的任意一种和稠密块相结合的神经网络模型，所述稠密块对 应多个操作组，每个操作组包括按照先后顺序进行的卷积处理、激活处理以及再一次的卷 积处理。 7. 根据权利要求6所述的方法，其特征在于，所述分割神经网络模型包括下采样单元和 上采样单元，所述下采样单元包括多个用于特征提取的稠密块，所述上采样单元包括多个 用于特征重建的稠密块，所述用于特征提取的稠密块和所述用于特征重建的稠密块之间进 行跳层连接。 8. 一种医学图像处理装置，其特征在于，所述装置包括： 第一获取模块，用于获取检测图像，所述检测图像包括黑质区域和/或红核区域的图 像； 第一确定模块，用于获取分割神经网络模型，采用所述分割神经网络模型对所述检测 图像进行分割操作，得到目标掩模图像； 第二确定模块，用于获取检测神经网络模型，采用所述检测神经网络模型对所述目标 掩模图像进行检测，得到检测结果。 9. 一种医学图像处理系统，包括图像扫描仪和计算机设备，其中，所述计算机设备包括 存储器和处理器，所述存储器存储有计算机程序，其特征在于，所述处理器执行所述计算机 程序时实现如下步骤： 获取检测图像，所述检测图像包括黑质区域和/或红核区域的图像； 获取分割神经网络模型，采用所述分割神经网络模型对所述检测图像进行分割操作， 得到目标掩模图像； 获取检测神经网络模型，采用所述检测神经网络模型对所述目标掩模图像进行检测， 得到检测结果。 10. 一种计算机可读存储介质，其上存储有计算机程序，其特征在于，所述计算机程序 被处理器执行时实现如下步骤： 获取检测图像，所述检测图像包括黑质区域和/或红核区域的图像； 获取分割神经网络模型，采用所述分割神经网络模型对所述检测图像进行分割操作， 得到目标掩模图像； 获取检测神经网络模型，采用所述检测神经网络模型对所述目标掩模图像进行检测， 得到检测结果。

title: MULTI-ATLAS-BASED MEDICAL IMAGE AUTOMATIC PARTITION SYSTEM, METHOD, DEVICE AND STORAGE MEDIUM; 基于多图谱的医学图像自动分区系统、方法、装置及存储介质
abstract:
本发明提供了一种多图谱的医学图像自动分区方法、系统、装置及存储介质。所述方法包括以下至少一个操作。可以获取样本图像，以及所述样本图像的解剖图谱。可以获取图像分区网络模型，所述图像分区网络模型为深度学习模型。可以用所述训练完备的图像分区网络模型处理待测图像，确定待测图像的图像分区结果。可以用所述训练完备的图像分区网络模型处理待测图像，确定待测图像的图像分区结果。本发明将深度卷积神经网络引入多图谱的医学图像自动分区操作中，采用多类别多样本训练后的神经网络鲁棒性好，分区耗时短，准确率高。

The invention provides a method, system, device and storage medium for automatic partitioning of medical images with multiple atlases. The method includes at least one of the following operations. A sample image and an anatomical atlas of the sample image can be acquired. An image partition network model can be obtained, and the image partition network model is a deep learning model. The well-trained image partition network model can be used to process the image to be tested and determine the image partition result of the image to be tested. The well-trained image partition network model can be used to process the image to be tested and determine the image partition result of the image to be tested. The invention introduces the deep convolutional neural network into the multi-atlas medical image automatic division operation, and the neural network after multi-category multi-sample training has good robustness, short division time and high accuracy.

title: MEDICAL IMAGE AUTOMATIC PARTITION SYSTEM, METHOD, DEVICE AND STORAGE MEDIUM BASED ON MULTIPLE ATLAS; 基于多图谱的医学图像自动分区系统、方法、装置及存储介质
abstract:
本发明提供了一种多图谱的医学图像自动分区方法、系统、装置及存储介质。所述方法包括以下至少一个操作。可以获取样本图像，以及所述样本图像的解剖图谱。可以获取图像分区网络模型，所述图像分区网络模型为深度学习模型。可以用所述训练完备的图像分区网络模型处理待测图像，确定待测图像的图像分区结果。可以用所述训练完备的图像分区网络模型处理待测图像，确定待测图像的图像分区结果。本发明将深度卷积神经网络引入多图谱的医学图像自动分区操作中，采用多类别多样本训练后的神经网络鲁棒性好，分区耗时短，准确率高。

The invention provides a method, system, device and storage medium for automatic partitioning of medical images with multiple atlases. The method includes at least one of the following operations. A sample image and an anatomical atlas of the sample image can be obtained. An image partition network model can be obtained, and the image partition network model is a deep learning model. The well-trained image partition network model can be used to process the image to be tested and determine the image partition result of the image to be tested. The well-trained image partition network model can be used to process the image to be tested and determine the image partition result of the image to be tested. The invention introduces the deep convolutional neural network into the multi-atlas medical image automatic division operation, and the neural network after multi-category multi-sample training has good robustness, short division time and high accuracy.

title: METHOD, DEVICE AND COMPUTER READABLE STORAGE MEDIUM FOR IMAGE AUTOMATIC SEGMENTATION; 一种图像自动分割的方法、装置及计算机可读存储介质
abstract:
本发明公开了一种图像分割的方法、装置及计算机可读存储介质，涉及计算机领域，特别医学图像处理领域，该方法包括：获取医学图像；将所述医学图像按不同器官/组织进行分割；从所述医学图像及所述分割图像分成若干份图像，得到医学图像子集及对应的分割图像子集；并分别进行图像分类训练及图像分割训练，得到图像分类器及图像分割器；利用所述图像分类器将待分割图像分成若干份；将分好的若干份待分割图像输入到与之对应的所述图像分割器进行分割，得到分割图像。本发明还提供了一种图像自动分割装置及计算机可读存储介质。通过本发明的方法、装置及计算机可读存储介质，可完成图像自动分类及自动分割，极大提升图像分割效率。

The present invention discloses a method, a device and a computer-readable storage medium for image segmentation, which relate to the computer field, particularly the field of medical image processing. The method includes: obtaining medical images; segmenting the medical images according to different organs/tissues; Divide the medical image and the segmented image into several images to obtain a medical image subset and the corresponding segmented image subset; and perform image classification training and image segmentation training respectively to obtain an image classifier and an image segmenter; The image classifier divides the image to be divided into several parts; the divided images are input to the corresponding image divider for division to obtain the divided image. The invention also provides an automatic image segmentation device and a computer-readable storage medium. Through the method, device and computer-readable storage medium of the present invention, automatic image classification and automatic segmentation can be completed, which greatly improves the efficiency of image segmentation.

title: 3D DISPLAY METHOD, DEVICE AND ELECTRONIC EQUIPMENT OF LUNG NODULES; 肺结节的3D显示方法、装置及电子设备
abstract:
本发明提供一种肺结节的3D显示方法、装置及电子设备，涉及图像处理技术领域，其中，肺结节的3D显示方法包括：获取肺结节图像；肺结节图像由U‑net网络输出；对肺结节图像进行语义分割，得到目标肺结节区域；对目标肺结节区域，重构肺结节的三维点云；基于三维点云，进行肺结节的3D显示。本发明通过对预计神经网络输出的肺结节图像，进行语义分割及三维点云重建，能够将肺结节与其它组织进行精确的划分，并对肺结节进行精确地显示。

The present invention provides a 3D display method, device and electronic equipment of lung nodules, and relates to the technical field of image processing. Among them, the 3D display method of lung nodules includes: obtaining lung nodule images; Output; semantic segmentation of the lung nodule image to obtain the target lung nodule area; for the target lung nodule area, reconstruct the three-dimensional point cloud of the lung nodule; based on the three-dimensional point cloud, perform 3D display of the lung nodule. By performing semantic segmentation and three-dimensional point cloud reconstruction on the lung nodule image output by the predicted neural network, the present invention can accurately divide the lung nodule from other tissues and accurately display the lung nodule.

title: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR SEGMENTING BRAIN INJURY AREA IN MULTI-DEVICE CEREBRAL INFARCTION MRI IMAGE; 用于多设备脑梗MRI图像中脑损伤区域分割方法及装置
abstract:
本申请公开了一种用于多设备脑梗MRI图像中脑损伤区域分割方法及装置。该方法包括接收第一扫描设备上的第一待处理脑梗核磁共振图像和第二扫描设备上的第二待处理脑梗核磁共振图像；通过转换器分别将所述第一待处理脑梗核磁共振图像和所述第二待处理脑梗核磁共振图像转换到公共域；以及在所述公共域中对转换后的所述脑梗核磁共振图像执行脑损伤分割。本申请解决了对于来自不同扫描设备的脑梗核磁共振图像上的病变分割处理效果较差的技术问题。通过本申请能够较好地分割在不同扫描设备上采集的MR图像上的脑部病变，进而准确检测出脑梗区域。

The application discloses a method and device for segmenting brain injury regions in multi-device cerebral infarction MRI images. The method includes receiving a first to-be-processed cerebral infarction MRI image on a first scanning device and a second to-be-processed cerebral infarction MRI image on a second scanning device; The resonance image and the second to-be-processed cerebral infarct MRI image are converted to a public domain; and the converted cerebral infarct MRI image is subjected to brain injury segmentation in the public domain. The present application solves the technical problem that the effect of segmentation processing on cerebral infarction MRI images from different scanning devices is poor. The present application can better segment the brain lesions on the MR images collected on different scanning devices, and then accurately detect the cerebral infarction area.
